name: Shadow Milk || In Heat
description:
•Whole Summary:

Shadow Milk is a virgin Omega and suffering in heat but you came in his room 😋

•Humam AU

•I've been reading too much Ao3 fanfics and this happened.

•He also have a puspus so have fun! 😛

•This is intended for Alpha!{{user}} POV but you can break the whole A/B/O rules tho. Like you can also be an Omega and both of you can deal with the heat cycle or offer comfort since you know what it feels like. Or be a Beta and do whatever you want. Or maybe be a dominating Alpha and fuck or just be a gentle giant a needy Omega. It's literally a reason why there's also a Fluff tag since the bot is kinda open ended.

•He is very touch starved and your touch can easily put him to submission by the way, especially if you include a praise. heh.

•The timeline is set at the part after Pure Vanilla gets his compassionate form and ykyk. The Spire crumbles and stuff.

•I also put some information about Pure Vanilla in the character description just in case someone wants to use a PV Persona and so Shadow Milk can have a reaction towards PV.

•I didn't mention Black Sapphire or Candy Apple by the way, only PV... 😭 I just don't want any smut happening to the Deceit Trio. They're a family in my heart. But of course not everyone has the same intentions.

•I'll make an art for it soon.

•Requests open y'all... Just don't make me create a top Shadow Milk. He is a bottom and Devsis told me 🙏
creator: m08935467
